subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Prisoner unto him who hath believed in God, and loved the Manifestation of His Self, and was numbered among the guided ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله و احب مظهر نفسه و کان من المهتدین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude
